title: Unlock OEM bootloader
command:
adb reboot bootloader
fastboot oem unlock
fastboot reboot
description: Unlocks the bootloader to allow flashing custom ROMs. This will wipe all user data.
notes: WARNING: This will completely wipe your device. Make sure to backup everything first.

title: Install TWRP recovery
command:
fastboot flash recovery twrp.img
fastboot reboot recovery
description: Flashes TWRP custom recovery to the device and boots into it.
notes: Make sure you have the correct TWRP image for your specific device model.

title: Boot TWRP temporarily
description: Boots into TWRP recovery without permanently flashing it.

title: Get device information
command:
adb shell getprop ro.product.model
adb shell getprop ro.product.board
adb shell getprop ro.build.version.release
adb shell getprop ro.build.display.id
description: Retrieves detailed device information including model, board, and Android version.

title: Sideload APK via ADB
description: Installs an APK file from your computer to the device.
notes: Make sure 'Unknown sources' is enabled in developer options.

title: Flash custom ROM via TWRP
command:
adb shell twrp wipe data
adb shell twrp wipe cache
adb shell twrp install /sdcard/Download/rom.zip
adb reboot system
description: Wipes data/cache and flashes a custom ROM zip file through TWRP.
notes: ALWAYS backup your data before flashing. This will completely wipe your device.

title: Backup critical partitions
command:
for part in boot system recovery modem; do
  fastboot getvar current-slot
  fastboot flash ${part}_a ${part}_a.img
  fastboot flash ${part}_b ${part}_b.img
done
description: Creates backups of critical partitions for A/B devices.
notes: Requires sufficient storage space for partition images.

title: Check if device is in EDL mode
description: Checks if the device is detected in Emergency Download Mode (9008).

title: Dump partition table with Python
description: Python script to dump Android partition images to internal storage.
notes: Requires root access and sufficient storage space.

title: Unisoc BROM unlock
command:
python3 sp_flash_tool.py --mode brom --unlock
fastboot oem unlock
description: Unlocks Unisoc chipset devices through BROM mode.
notes: Specific to Unisoc/Spreadtrum chipsets. May require special drivers.
